ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the player (e.g., Sr., Jr.) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium name of the team */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistics belong to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the statistics were recorded */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_player_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistics belong to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player in the game */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the commissioner */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach leads */,
  "tenure" TEXT /* Tenure of the coach with the team */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, recruiter, analyst, fan) */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date of subscription */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
